narrative_blocks.body: Joshua Talcott died in Bolton on March 22, 1799, aged 87. His wife Rachel Hollister outlived him by eight years, dying in Bolton in 1807 at age 94. His son Josiah was killed at age 9 by the fall of a tree (1766); his son Job married Abigail Huntington and fathered Gurdon, whose line extended into the Granite Mills of Talcottville.

parents.father_research_notes: Thomas Hollister and Dorothy Hill of Glastonbury

death.cause: killed by fall of a tree

narrative_blocks.header: Killed by a falling tree at age 8
narrative_blocks.body: Josiah Talcott was born April 30, 1757 and killed by the fall of a tree on March 10, 1766 — age 8. SOURCE: Talcott Pedigree 1876.
Samuel died in 1770, aged about seven.
